title: Faculty of Art, Design and Architecture

Faculty of Art, Design and Architecture

Printing Handcrafts Studio

MENU

Printing Handcrafts Studio

It is a research and development-based workshop where
creativity is integrated with the student's personal practices. Our students
learn the basic application methods of printing crafts. In this studio, with
the support of our printing technician, writing and batik art lesson
applications are carried out in the company of our professor lecturer.
